servinfo.title: Cooling System Components, Hoses and Connections Inspection

s1.ptxt: Inspect cooling system components, hoses and connections for leakage, damage and cracks, and clamps for tightness according to Engine Cooling System Inspection .
Replace all hoses that are leaky or have cracks or other damage. Replace all clamps which cannot maintain proper tightness.
Clean frontal area of radiator core.
Refer to Coolant Level Check for procedure of level check.
